memberdef.argsstring: (const float complex *ref, size_t ny, size_t nx, size_t dwell, size_t noise_lo, size_t noise_hi, det_noise_mode_t noise_mode, float threshold, int nthreads)
memberdef.name: detector2d_create

parameterdescription.para: Reference image, flat row-major CF32, length ny*nx.

simplesect.para: Heap-allocated state, or NULL on allocation failure.

briefdescription.para: Reset correlator, ring buffer, and last-corr flag.
Replace the reference image and recompute conj(FFT2(ref)).

detaileddescription.para: Also resets. The new reference must have the same ny*nx total size.

parameterdescription.para: New reference, flat row-major CF32, length ny*nx.

memberdef.argsstring: (detector2d_state_t *state, const float complex *in, size_t n_in, det_result2d_t *result, size_t max_results)
memberdef.name: detector2d_push

briefdescription.para: Push an arbitrary-length CF32 chunk through the 2-D detector.

detaileddescription.para: Behaviour is identical to detector_push() except frames have length ny*nx and results carry (row, col) instead of a single lag.

parameterdescription.para: Input CF32 array of length n_in.
Number of complex samples to push.
Output array; caller allocates at least max_results.

simplesect.para: Number of detections stored in result[].

detaileddescription.para: Structurally identical to detector_core.c with corr replaced by corr2d and peak decomposed into (row, col) via integer divide/modulo.
